name: A. MOHAMED YASAR
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | React.js Architect | MERN Specialist | REST API Expert
summary: Innovative Full Stack Engineer with 2.5+ years of expertise in architecting high-fidelity, production-grade web ecosystems using React.js and the MERN stack. Expert at bridging the gap between sophisticated UI/UX requirements and robust backend logic. Proven track record in orchestrating complex REST API integrations, optimizing SQL database performance, and conducting deep-system debugging to maintain 99.9% uptime. Actively expanding technical horizons into Enterprise Java, Spring Boot, and Python-based automation to build the next generation of scalable, secure architecture.

aiTools: AI-Driven Code Analysis & Unit Test Generation

description: Architected and maintained modular, high-performance UI components using React.js and Material UI, significantly improving UI consistency across enterprise modules.
Engineered seamless integration between complex frontend modules and relational backend APIs, ensuring reliable data synchronization and high-fidelity user experiences.
Wrote and optimized complex SQL queries for data validation, detailed issue analysis, and system-wide performance troubleshooting.
Led cross-functional investigations to resolve critical UI, API, and database-related bottlenecks, achieving a marked reduction in post-deployment ticket volume.
Collaborated with developers and QA teams to orchestrate smooth application releases, including rigorous pre-production validation and post-deployment stability checks.
Authored and maintained comprehensive technical documentation for internal features, API contracts, and critical issue resolutions to facilitate team transparency.
Gained deep understanding of the request-response lifecycle and data flow by working closely with backend API layers and analyzing network logs.

projects.name: Job Planner Enterprise
description: Full Stack Contributor to a high-traffic Job Management System, focusing on modular UI development and efficient data rendering.
Integrated backend APIs with robust validation logic, ensuring reliable data flow across thousands of records.
Investigated and resolved complex cross-layer issues spanning the UI, API middleware, and SQL stored procedures.
Contributed UI/UX modernizations and workflow improvements that significantly enhanced operational efficiency for enterprise clients.
Supported pre-production testing and validation cycles to ensure stable and reliable application releases.

projects.name: Cyber-Premium MERN Ecosystem
description: Architected a state-of-the-art personal engineering dashboard featuring real-time visitor tracking and persistent MongoDB storage.
Implemented secure RESTful APIs with Express.js and integrated with MongoDB for reliable data persistence.
Designed a custom glassmorphic UI system using Material UI and Framer Motion for high-fidelity interactive effects.
Automated deployment workflows using Render's CI/CD infrastructure, ensuring seamless builds from GitHub pushes.

education.institution: M.I.E.T Arts and Science College, Tiruchirappalli

additionalInfo.availability: Ready for Immediate Deployment (Notice Period Served)
additionalInfo.workPreference: Willing to work from office | Rotational shifts
